notes: Canonical sports-card edit catalog. One row per distinct physical card.
Use sourceRepresentative as the edit/reveal timestamp: held in hand after the fan and right before the swipe/reveal.
technicalCardTimestamp is optional and only records a later fully visible card time when it differs from edit timing.
